acceptance_evidence.criterion: Proxy scoring config plus script path produce per-checkpoint proxy scores on the hard-seed fixture.
acceptance_evidence.evidence: Analyzer and readiness paths exist via #3307 and #3759, with later readiness tightening through #3990, #4026, #4066, #4086, #4132, and #4483.
acceptance_evidence.remaining: Current readiness checker reports 0 of 8 predictive checkpoints resolve locally, below the required 6.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Spearman rank correlations reported for candidate proxy and val_ade or val_fde versus hard-set success across at least six checkpoints.
acceptance_evidence.evidence: #3307 added Spearman-capable proxy-history analysis, but no valid input set is available.
acceptance_evidence.remaining: Need at least six checkpoints from one real training run plus non-degenerate proxy-enabled hard-seed success spread.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: A/B proxy-selected versus ADE-selected checkpoint on predictive_hard_seeds_v1.
acceptance_evidence.evidence: No merged PR or current readiness output contains this benchmark result; #4483 records it as remaining work.
acceptance_evidence.remaining: Run hard-seed A/B only after durable or hydrated checkpoints and proxy history exist.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Outcome classified as adopt, negative result, or diagnostic with next step recorded.
acceptance_evidence.evidence: #4483 integration_report records diagnostic blocked state and next empirical action.
acceptance_evidence.remaining: Final adopt or negative result classification requires the empirical proxy-vs-ADE and A/B evidence.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Durable artifact policy followed; do not rely on worktree-local output/tmp.
acceptance_evidence.evidence: Current readiness checker reports blocked_by_artifact_scope.worktree_local_output = 8 and keeps the issue fail-closed.
acceptance_evidence.remaining: Hydrate or promote the required checkpoint artifacts to a durable, locally resolvable source.
